[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111111111 a
1 111111111 a
2 111111111 a
3 111111111 a
4 110011011 6
5 101100011 5
6 111011111 8
7 101110001 5

01 10 011101011 6
12 21 101001010 4
23 32 011000100 3
34 43 111101101 7
45 54 000010010 2
56 65 000001011 3
67 76 001111001 5
70 07 011101000 4

02 20 110100001 4
13 31 110001110 5
24 42 100101001 4
35 53 111111111 a match 0 1 2 3
46 64 000011001 3
57 75 001110010 4
60 06 010010001 3
71 17 000000011 2

03 30 101100101 5
14 41 001100011 4
25 52 100111011 6
36 63 111110100 6
47 74 001100000 2
50 05 010011010 4
61 16 001111010 5
72 27 101001001 4

04 40 010001000 2
15 51 001110001 4
26 62 100110000 3
37 73 110001101 5
